templates.title: Jellyseerr (Legacy)
templates.name: jellyseerr
templates.description: Jellyseerr is a free and open source software application for managing requests for your media library. It is a fork of Overseerr built to bring support for Jellyfin & Emby media servers! Note: Jellyseerr is no longer actively maintained. New users should use Seerr instead.
templates.note: Legacy media request manager - new users should use Seerr instead
